UMGCCC Flow Core Analyzer Long Cleans 

Auroras 

General Notes 

For all the Auora’s 

The cleaning tubing assembly is stored in the drawer under the Aurora UV 

Run once a month or as needed 

Cleaning Process 

Bleach 

Prep Bleach Solution 

5% Bleach 

3 L is more than enough for the Long Clean 

Run the automated Long Clean program in SpectroFlo 

 Follow all steps with bleach in the tank and in the sample tube 

Do NOT replace filter in last step of the cleaning process 

Tank Rinse 

Dump remaining bleach solution in the tank 

Rinse the tank with Milli-Q water > 3 times 

Make sure to rinse the tubing in addition to the tank 

Do not let tubing touch anything other than the tank or a clean kimwipe 

Water 

Fill tank with Milli-Q water 

Run automated Long Clean program in SpectroFlo 

Dump waste tank and fill sheath tank with Milli-Q water 

Post Cleaning 

Run a clean tube of water for at least 10 min to clear any debris 

Run at least manual QC to make sure everything is running appropriately 

LSR 

Run Cleaning Agent 

Prep  

Disconnect filter from the sheath line 

Select, and prep, cleaning agent 

Contrad: Pour 5% contrad from stock bottle into tank 

Bleach: Prepare at least 2.5 L of 10% bleach 

Run cleaning agent through system 

Run 1 full tube of selected cleaning agent with stage arm open 

Run on High with stage arm closed for at least 40 minutes 

Run Water without Filter 

Rinse tank at least 3 times with Milli-Q water 

Fill tank at least halfway with water 

Run water 

1 full tube of water with stage arm open 

Run on High with stage arm closed for at least 20 minutes 

Run Water with Filter 

Reconnect filter to sheath line 

Run water 

1 full tube of water with stage arm open 

Run on High with stage arm closed for at least 20 minutes 

Run CST 

Verify everything is running ok 

Canto II 

Run Automated Long Clean 

Cytometer à Cleaning Modes à Long Clean 

Run CST 

Verify everything is running ok 

 

Aria II  

Bleach Clean (In Progress) 

 When to run 

Quarterly 

After several contamination events 

 Run Bleach  

Disconnect tank from Fluidics Cart 

Remove filter from fluidics line 

Drain filter of sheath 

 Make bleach 

5% Bleach 

≤ 5 L 

Add bleach to tank 

Reconnect tank to Fluidics Cart 

Make sure filter is NOT connected to tank 

 Run Fluidics Start Up 

Use bad 130 µm nozzle 

 Turn on stream 

 Run bleach tube for ≥ 1 hour 

Turn off stream 

Disconnect tank from Fluidics Cart 

Dump bleach in sink 

 Clean Sheath Tank 

Rinse tank with water and dump 

Full Tank Rinse 

Fill tank with water 

Close Tank with Lid 

Roll water around ENTIRE tank 

Dump water 

Repeat ≥ 2 times 

 Run Water 

1st System Rinse 

Add water to tank 

Connect tank to Fluidics Cart 

Filter is NOT attached to fluidics line 

Run Fluidics Start Up 

Turn on stream 

Run water tube ≥ 30 min 

Turn off stream 

Disconnect tank from Fluidics Cart 

2nd System Rinse 

Attach filter to fluidics line 

Repeat steps a iii- a v 

Bleed filter of air during fluidics start up 

Leave system in water if done before break 

Otherwise run a sheath start up
